title: ふたりの進む、その"先"へ

text_block_list.text:
The news that Tamamo Cross managed to
overtake fifteen people in a race shakes Oguri
Cap.

Super Creek and Inari One persuade her to have
an honest discussion with Tamamo Cross.

After sharing their true thoughts with one
another, the two of them rekindle their
friendship... and rivalry.
